title: Fluffy Spicy Peruvian Potatoes Bowl
description: A comforting bowl that marries fluffy, sousvide potatoes with vibrant Peruvian spice, topped with creamy avocado, crunchy peanuts, and a citrusy finish.
instructions: Wash and halve the baby potatoes; season them with salt, pepper, 2 tbsp of olive oil, lime juice, minced garlic, ají amarillo paste, cumin, and coriander.
Place the seasoned potatoes in a vacuum‑sealed bag and cook sous‑vide for 45 minutes.
While the potatoes cook, toast 1/4 cup of peanuts in a dry pan until golden, then crush them.
Remove the potatoes from the bag, pat them dry, and heat 1 tbsp of extra virgin olive oil in a skillet over medium‑high heat.
Sear the potatoes for 2–3 minutes, turning until all sides are crisp and golden.
Transfer the crispy potatoes to a bowl; top with diced avocado, sliced red onion, chopped cilantro, and crushed peanuts.
Drizzle with a little extra virgin olive oil, squeeze fresh lime wedges over the bowl, and season with additional salt or pepper if needed.
Serve immediately for a warm, flavorful experience.
